title: GridStatus ERCOT System AS Capacity Monitor
description:
Real-time ERCOT totals for ancillary services and capacity available for dispatch in SCED (Security-Constrained Economic Dispatch).

***Acronym Assistance***
* RRS - Responsive Reserves
* CLRs - Controllable Load Resources
* FFR - Fast Frequency Response
* PFR- Primary Frequency Response
* UFR - Under Frequency Relay
* ESR - Energy Storage Resource
* ECRS - ERCOT Contingency Reserve Service
* QSGR - Quick Start Generation Resource
* ONSC - ONLINE Synchronous Condenser (resource status)
* PRC - Physical Responsive Capability
* BP - Base Point
* EMR - Available for commitment or dispatch only for ERCOT-declared Emergency Conditions
* OUTL - Offline Unavailable
* EMRSWGR - Offline Available Only for Emergency Condition

Implemented on December 5th, 2025, as part of ERCOT's RTC+B project, which substantially reworked the previous AS Capacity Monitor table.
